- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project (created pnpm workspace skeleton and package stubs)

- [x] Customize the Project (added crypto service, tests, and protocol docs)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (none required)

- [x] Compile the Project (pnpm install and crypto tests)

- [x] Create and Run Task (not needed for Phase 0)

- [x] Launch the Project (not applicable for Phase 0)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README and protocol docs updated; comments removed)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
